title: McCarthy Tétrault Continues to Boost Financial Services Practice With Addition of Leading Fintech / Banking Regulatory Lawyer
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Continues to Boost Financial Services Practice With Addition of Leading Fintech / Banking Regulatory Lawyer
McCarthy Tétrault deepens its outstanding national, full-service banking and financial services team with the addition of a new senior associate, Cindy Zhang . Based in the firm’s Toronto office, Cindy’s expertise in banking and payments regulation, anti-money laundering and consumer protection will be a great benefit to financial institution and fintech clients navigating these complex, ever-evolving areas.
A Certified Anti-Money Laundering Specialist with ACAMS, Cindy has extensive experience with Proceeds of Crime (Money Laundering) and Terrorist Financing Act and FINTRAC regulations. She works with financial institutions and fintechs to design compliant digital financial products and services related to consumer lending, payment processing, and outsourcing. She is well-versed in Canadian consumer protection regulations, the Bank Act, and Payments Canada rules. When necessary, Cindy works closely with clients to help them address federal or provincial regulatory disputes that impact their business.
“Cindy is a terrific addition to the firm’s Business Law group and national Financial Services practice,” said Marc MacMullin , co-leader of the firm's National Financial Services group. “The combination of Cindy Zhang with the recent arrival of Sandra Mollett , a banking regulatory strategist, and Vanessa Johnson , an expert in payments, provides us with a strong presence in this important practice area for our financial services clients. We are dedicated to ensuring our clients receive the support and advice they need to effectively manage risk while operating under Canada’s increasingly complex financial services regulatory regimes. The addition of these skilled practitioners underscores our commitment to this goal.”
McCarthy Tétrault’s Financial Services Group provides clients with in-depth industry and legal knowledge, shaping the smart solutions needed by financial institutions to innovate while maintaining regulatory compliance. The group is ranked as a top Canadian practice by leading national and international legal directories, including Chambers Canada , Chambers Global , and Legal 500 . To learn more about our banking and financial services industry expertise, click here .
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
- Cindy Zhang Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
